meta.title: NeuroApoyo | Cognitive follow-up
meta.description: A platform for clinics to organize assessments, patients, and daily follow-up.

common.disclaimer: This platform does not replace professional clinical evaluation.
common.orientative: Results are preliminary and informative; they do not constitute a medical diagnosis.

landing.heroTitle: More clarity for every care journey.
landing.heroText: Organize assessments, follow patients, and preserve historical information in a simple, secure, human experience.
landing.featureTitle: Less administration. More time for care.
landing.featureText: A digital foundation that centralizes follow-up without replacing clinical judgment.
landing.feature1Text: Patients, assessments, answers, observations, and history in one environment.
landing.feature2Text: Mood, daily tasks, habits, and streaks help provide routine context.
landing.feature3Text: Structured summaries support professional review without issuing diagnoses.
landing.feature4Text: Access policies separate each doctor's and patient's information.
landing.howTitle: From registration to clinical review in three steps.
landing.step1Text: Create the patient, record observations, and keep history accessible.
landing.step2Text: Assign instruments and monitor activities, mood, and progress.
landing.step3Text: Review answers, charts, and preliminary reports before appointments.
landing.audienceTitle: Built for professionals and clinics supporting cognitive health.
landing.screensTitle: A clear experience for both sides.
landing.pricingTitle: Start simple and grow with the platform.
landing.pricingText: Estimated price for early professionals during the beta stage.
landing.contactTitle: Want to help shape the beta?
landing.contactText: Tell us how your clinic works and which workflows need more clarity.

auth.title: Access your workspace
auth.subtitle: Sign in with a professional or patient account.
auth.demoHelp: Select a profile to fill in the demo credentials.
auth.invalid: We could not sign you in. Check your credentials.
auth.sideTitle: Technology supporting more contextual clinical decisions.
auth.sideText: Organize the journey without turning preliminary results into diagnoses.

doctor.subtitle: Follow patients, assessments, and recent activity.
doctor.name: Name
doctor.reportNotice: This report organizes information and is not a diagnosis.

patient.subtitle: This is your follow-up space.
patient.moodNote: Would you like to add something about your day?
patient.streakHelp: Complete one activity to keep your streak.
patient.assessmentCompleteText: Your professional can review the answers within the assessment context.

errors.unauthorized: You do not have permission to access this page.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
